abilities.name: Awakened
abilities.description: You want to build up @node-red #Awakened# by spamming @node-shaman #Totem# when you have @node-red #Mask of the Fanatic# (Using high #+Totem# Cost item like #Lower#). During @node-red #Awakened#, you also want to have @node-red #Mask of the Fanatic# on to activate @node-blue #Totemic Shatter#.

abilities.name: Mystic Masks
abilities.description: Most of the time you would want to be on @node-red #Awakened# to activate @node-blue #Totemic Shatter#.

abilities.name: Tribal Chants
abilities.description: This node gives significant buffs to yourself and your teammates, make sure to refresh these buffs on cooldown.

abilities.name: Exploding Puppets
abilities.description: This interacts with the #Strings of Fate# Major Id, which triggers this node instantly when the @node-red #Puppets# spawn.

abilities.name: Totemic Shatter
abilities.description: @node-shaman #Totem# instantly activates all its effects, including summoning @node-red #Puppets#, Healing, and Damage. Must have @node-red #Awakened#.

aspects.name: Ritualist's Embodiment of the Ancestral Avatar
aspects.description: Allows you to activate @node-red Awakened faster, and you can sustain @node-red Awakened state for longer.

aspects.name: Aspect of Stances
aspects.description: Buffs all the effects of @node-red Mystic Masks.

aspects.name: Aspect of Beckoned Legion
aspects.description: @node-red Puppet Master gains more Puppets. Increasing the damage potential.

aspects.name: Aspect of Channeler
aspects.description: Makes it easier to buff teammates with the larger @node-red Tribal Chants range. Good QOL

aspects.name: Aspect of Acceleration
aspects.description: Allows @node-red Puppets and @node-red Effigies to move faster. Good QOL!
